title: The Best of Luck
writer: Arthur Collins, Henry Hamilton, Albert S. Le Vino
actors: Kathryn Adams, Jack Holt, Lila Leslie
plot: Leslie MacLeod, a young American who has come to Scotland after buying her ancestral castle, is admired by two suitors, young nobleman Lord Glenayr, whom she loves, and Lanzana, an unscrupulous Spaniard, whom she despises. Lanzana...
